race.description: Casino Rsm Group Beef Week Cup Hcp
race.comment: PRESSALONG (6) improving mare in career best form. Rounded up inferior opposition with ease with a dominant win over 1540m at the Gold Coast Poly. Has a good record here and will be strong late. BABY RYAN (4) deep into the campaign and gets the right set-up for this. Closed fast in the heavy (10) going to finish a narrow second over 1405m at Coffs Harbour. Winning rider hops back on and shapes as a genuine top-three prospect. OCEAN ALPS (3) is close to her peak for this and will need a good ride from the wide gate. Eye-catching run from back in the field when fourth over 1400m at the Gold Coast. On the quick back-up and the claim helps on the heavy surface. REJOICED (2) best form is over this trip and ready to his his straps fifth-up. Sat on the speed with the 59.5kg to finish a close-up third over 1300m at Toowoomba. Has the gate speed to take up a forward position. Don't underestimate. The chances don't end there.
